gold_claim: Speculative decoding depends on verification accepting draft tokens.
supporting_text: Speculative decoding only works if verification accepts the draft tokens.

gold_claim: Verification becomes a bottleneck beyond eight draft tokens.
supporting_text: The method cannot scale beyond 8 draft tokens because verification becomes the bottleneck.

gold_claim: Data-limited pretraining may spend more compute on each data point.
supporting_text: Under infinite compute, data-limited pretraining may require reusing each data point with more computation.
why_valuable: Changes training strategy when data is scarce.
